The River Stage
Tom Lee Park
Memphis, Tennessee
May 8, 1994
 
The Memphis in May Beale Street Festival
 
 
1.	Jokerman
2.	Seor (Tales Of Yankee Power)
3.	All Along The Watchtower
4.	I Shall Be Released
5.	Tangled Up In Blue
6.	Watching The River Flow
7.	Masters Of War 
8.	Mama, You Been On My Mind
9.	It's All Over Now, Baby Blue
10.	Highway 61 Revisited
11.	In The Garden
12.	She Belongs To Me
13.	Maggie's Farm
14.	Ballad Of A Thin Man
15.	It Ain't Me, Babe
 
 
Concert # 575 of The Never-Ending Tour
Concert # 25 of the 1994 US Spring Tour
1994 concert # 39
 
Concert # 119 with the 9th Never-Ending Tour Band:
Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar)
Bucky Baxter (pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar)
John Jackson (guitar)
Tony Garnier (bass)
Winston Watson (drums & percussion)
 
7-9, 15 acoustic with the band
5, 6, 8, 9, 12, 15 Bob Dylan harmonica
 
3 new songs (20%) compared to previous concert
No new songs for this tour.
